title: Tracker local dev: run bun install before bun dev
body: Fresh `beskid_tracker` checkouts fail `bun run dev` with `Script not found "vite"` until `bun install` completes. `@beskid/docs-ui` resolves from GitHub Packages and needs npm auth (`NPM_TOKEN` / `.npmrc`) or the install aborts before vite is linked.

source.subject: feat(superrepo): add beskid_tracker submodule, repo manifests, and Beskid hub UI.
